title: Humanoid Robots Are Making a Leap! Zhang Wei from Zhujidi: Their Intelligence Has Reached the Level of GPT-3
excerpt: At the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, Zhang Wei, founder of Zhujidi, delivered an important speech, stating that humanoid robots are currently i
content_html:
At the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, Zhang Wei, founder of Zhujidi, delivered an important speech, stating that humanoid robots are currently in a period of rapid exponential growth. He mentioned that the "robot brain" of Zhujidi has reached an intelligence level similar to GPT-3. He pointed out that current technological progress is not just linear but represents a breakthrough leap.

Zhang Wei mentioned in his speech that Zhujidi was founded in 2022 and positions itself as a product-driven company with technology at its core. He emphasized that manufacturing the robot body is relatively easy, but the real challenge lies in combining artificial intelligence with data from the physical world to achieve more efficient intelligent applications. According to his judgment, physical AI is the core capability driving the development of this industry.

He further explained that the current development of embodied intelligence technology is similar to the "robot brain" entering the early stage of GPT-3. This "brain" is not a single model but consists of multiple parts, including language models, vision models, and task planning, forming a collaborative system. Zhang Wei believes that the key to the future lies in how to coordinate these technologies in real time at the millisecond level and optimize them with hardware.

In terms of commercialization, Zhang Wei proposed the idea of "general body + APP." He pointed out that single-skill robot applications have limited value, but by maintaining a general configuration and gradually adding skills, a multi-functional intelligent agent will eventually be formed. He warned the industry not to blindly follow the development path of large models, but rather to enter specific scenarios as soon as they have basic capabilities, so that practical applications can feed back to model optimization.

With multiple rounds of financing supported by leading institutions such as Alibaba, Zhujidi's industrialization and internationalization capabilities are gradually strengthening. Zhang Wei's speech not only demonstrated the huge potential of embodied intelligence technology but also provided new insights into the direction of industry development.

content_html_zh:
在2026世界人工智能大会上，筑基地创始人张伟发表重要演讲，表示人形机器人目前正处于快速指数增长期。 他提到，珠鸡地的“机器人大脑”已经达到了类似于GPT-3的智能水平。 他指出，当前的技术进步不是线性的，而是突破性的飞跃。

张伟在致辞中提到，筑基地成立于2022年，定位为一家以技术为核心、产品驱动的公司。 他强调，制造机器人本体相对容易，但真正的挑战在于将人工智能与物理世界的数据结合起来，实现更高效的智能应用。 他认为，物理AI是驱动这个行业发展的核心能力。

他进一步解释说，目前具身智能技术的发展类似于进入GPT-3早期阶段的“机器人大脑”。 这个“大脑”不是单一的模型，而是由语言模型、视觉模型、任务规划等多个部分组成，形成一个协作系统。 张伟认为，未来的关键在于如何将这些技术在毫秒级实时协调起来，并与硬件进行优化。

在商业化方面，张巍提出了“通用本体+APP”的思路。 他指出，单一技能的机器人应用价值有限，但通过保持通用配置并逐步添加技能，最终将形成多功能智能体。 他告诫业界不要盲目追随大模型的发展道路，而是在具备基础能力后就进入具体场景，让实际应用反哺模型优化。

在阿里巴巴等领先机构的多轮融资支持下，珠鸡地的产业化和国际化能力正在逐步增强。 张伟的演讲不仅展示了物联网智能技术的巨大潜力，也为行业发展方向提供了新的见解。
